title: Copying views into other / new boards
excerpt: Does anyone know if it is possible to copy a set ‘view’ from a board and paste that view to other or new boards? Is this something available on enterprise? We are on the pro plan.

posts.author: K_B (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know if it is possible to copy a set ‘view’ from a board and paste that view to other or new boards? Is this something available on enterprise? We are on the pro plan.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, there’s no way to C/P board or item views at this time. That’s a great suggestion though. Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
